heading: Liability of barge removal contractors
label: 4705 Liability of barge removal contractors
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). substituted “subchapter” for “chapter”.Pub. L. 119–602006— in subsec. (a) struck out par. (1) designation before “A barge removal” and substituted “subcontractor are not” for “subcontractor not”, redesignated par. (2) as subsec. (b) and subpars. (A) and (B) of former par. (2) as pars. (1) and (2) of subsec. (b), respectively, and substituted “Subsection (a)” for “Paragraph (1)”.Pub. L. 109–304
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). substituted “subchapter” for “chapter”.Pub. L. 119–602006— in subsec. (a) struck out par. (1) designation before “A barge removal” and substituted “subcontractor are not” for “subcontractor not”, redesignated par. (2) as subsec. (b) and subpars. (A) and (B) of former par. (2) as pars. (1) and (2) of subsec. (b), respectively, and substituted “Subsection (a)” for “Paragraph (1)”.Pub. L. 109–304

children.label: a
children.text: A barge removal contractor and its subcontractor are not liable for damages that result from actions taken or omitted to be taken in the course of removing a barge under this subchapter.
with respect to personal injury or wrongful death; or
if the contractor or subcontractor is grossly negligent or engages in willful misconduct.
